data.title: OG ‘Satoshi era’ wallet moves 150 Bitcoin after 14.3 years of dormancy
data.description:
A long-dormant Bitcoin wallet dating back to the earliest days of the network has suddenly come back to life, moving 150 Bitcoins after being inactive for over 14 years. Blockchain transactions tracker Lookonchain reported on Thursday that a “Satoshi-era” Bitcoin address, one active since 2009, transferred Bitcoin worth more than $16 million in its first […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/satoshi-era-wallet-moves-bitcoin/

data.title: Australian Crypto Adoption Outpaces US, Data Shows
data.description:
Australia’s crypto adoption rate reached 31% in 2025, up from 28% in 2024, putting the nation among the world’s most crypto-engaged populations, as mobile wallet usage indicators show activity more focused on trading and speculation than in other developing countries, according to a16z’s State of Crypto 2025 report. The findings come as crypto’s total market […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/australian-crypto-adoption-outpaces-us-data-shows/

data.title: X Layer Mainnet to undergo technical upgrade on October 27
data.description: According to an official announcement from X Layer, as protocol integration and ecosystem expansion continue to advance, the company plans to upgrade the underlying public chain technology to further enhance overall system performance and scalability, aiming to become a leading platform for high-performance blockchain solutions. The upgrade is scheduled to begin at 23:30 (UTC+8) on October 27, 2025, and is expected to last approximately one hour. Block production will resume on the mainnet upon completion. Any adjustments to the upgrade progress or schedule will be promptly updated through official announcement channels. The announcement states that during the upgrade, block production on the X Layer mainnet will be suspended, and all related services will be temporarily interrupted, including OKX exchange-related asset deposits and withdrawals, DEX trading services, OKX Wallet functions, and OKX Pay. Users with any questions are welcome to contact OKX customer service. The X Layer team stated that it will continue to work to improve platform stability, security, and operational reliability to achieve the long-term ecological vision of "The New Money Chain."

data.title: USD.AI Bridges DeFi and AI by Turning Stablecoins Into Loans for Nvidia GPUs
data.description:
USD.AI is revolutionizing the intersection of decentralized finance (DeFi) and artificial intelligence (AI) by developing a platform that transforms stablecoins into loans specifically designed for acquiring Nvidia GPUs, which are essential for high-performance computing. This innovative approach allows users to leverage their digital assets, making it easier for creators and businesses to access cutting-edge technology without the need for upfront capital. By facilitating this seamless conversion of stablecoins into funding for GPUs, USD.AI not only enhances financial accessibility but also empowers a new wave of AI-driven projects and applications.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/10/24/usdai-bridges-defi-and-ai-by-turning-stablecoins-into-loans-for-nvidia-gpus

data.title: CZ: Accused of terminating business relationships with no partners during imprisonment
data.description: In a social media post responding to community messages congratulating him on his pardon, CZ stated that despite the difficult period of accusations and imprisonment, no partners had terminated their business relationships. He stated, "While this experience was extremely difficult, it did not break me. While my official record was temporarily tarnished, my personal reputation remains strong. My family, friends, and community have always supported me; I have never walked alone." CZ concluded by declaring that he will continue to work hand in hand with the community.

data.title: Bitcoin Spot ETF Experiences Net Outflows Amid Market Lows
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Glassnode indicates that Bitcoin spot ETFs are currently experiencing a phase of net outflows. Historically, such occurrences are often observed at local market lows, reflecting a decline in investor sentiment. Glassnode highlights that when fund flows stabilize or shift to net inflows, historical data suggests this often coincides with a recovery in demand and the initial stages of a price rebound, potentially signaling the onset of a market recovery cycle.

data.title: OKX will launch TURTLEUSDT perpetual contracts on October 24, supporting up to 50x leverage
data.description: According to official news, OKX will launch the TURTLEUSDT perpetual contract simultaneously on its website, app, and API at 18:00 (UTC+8) on October 24, 2025, supporting up to 50x leverage trading.
